utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: Each item includes the type of coverage and costs. Health: clearly states physical and mental health insurance with a monthly cost and details. Property: specifies home/contents insurance context with cost and details (covers photography equipment). Travel: includes travel insurance with cost and relevant coverage details. Additional services: lists enhancements with costs. Total budget: provides total monthly cost (no annual, but a complete monthly breakdown is present). All items are fully specified with required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each plan named in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings.
